description_long: This is a rectangular mirror with an ornate, baroque-style frame finished in a gold color. The frame features intricate floral and scrollwork detailing along all four edges, giving it a luxurious and classical appearance. The mirror surface is flat and occupies most of the frame, bordered by a thin inner gold trim. The frame appears to be made of molded wood or resin, with a metallic gold finish that enhances its decorative appeal. The mirror is relatively thin in profile, suggesting it is designed to be mounted on a wall rather than freestanding. Its overall design is elegant and would serve as a statement piece in a sophisticated urban setting.
description: A rectangular mirror with an ornate gold baroque-style frame and a flat reflective surface, designed for wall mounting. The frame features intricate floral and scrollwork details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full ornate gold frame and the flat mirror surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and the layered construction of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear-angled front view, similar to view 0, highlighting the decorative frame and mirror surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Ornate rectangular frame with baroque floral and scrollwork details, gold finish, likely wood or resin construction.
